# AEGIS Forecast Drift — Settings & Data Quality

Governed monitoring metadata — **V2** snapshot (read-only). _Governed & read-only — not editable configuration._

### Purpose
Governance and data-quality transparency: the **18 data-quality checks**, latest governed run, freshness, sources, lineage, coverage, versioning, and the governed model parameters.

### Status
🚧 **Structural shell** created in **E7D.0**. The full panel set (18/18 check detail, weights, thresholds, lineage) will be built in **E7D.11** per `E7D0_settings_data_quality_contract.md`.

### Governed model parameters (read-only, not editable here)
- **Weights:** Performance 20% · Shape 40% · Stability 30% · Volatility 10%
- **Severity thresholds:** Healthy 0–20 · Watch 20–40 · Warning 40–70 · Critical 70+
- **Service / Scenario status:** `service` empty (0) → use `forecast_key`; `scenario` single value (`Enterprise`).

### Governance note
All thresholds, weights and classifications live in the **V1** Python engine. This dashboard **reads** governed datasets only — *el dashboard no cocina datos.*
